title: Cleanup of podman stats
body:
Give errors if --latest, --all or container IDs specified at the same time.
Give errors if --latest is specified by the container is not running
Only give stats on all running containers if --all is specified
If a list of containers is given, but some are not running, print error message.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Actually I examined my code and I made some bad assumptions, but I cleaned up error when you got stats on non running containers.  Also changed output to match Docker on non running containers.  Use "--" rather then 0.
LGTM, one 'or' question that can be addressed later if necessary.
